MoD Home Tenders Acquisitions

Request for Proposal: 155mm / 52-calibre Mounted Gun System

RFP No: MoD/2026/ART/0441 | Issued by: Ministry of Defence, India

The Ministry of Defence invites proposals for the procurement of 100 units of a 155mm 52-calibre Mounted Gun System (MGS) for the Indian Army. The estimated value is approximately ₹6,500 cr. Last date for bid submission is 08 July 2026.

Interested vendors may download the full Request for Proposal document below.

  • Download RFP (PDF) — MoD/2026/ART/0441
  • Corrigendum-1 (PDF)
Government of India · Ministry of Defence
